failures.query: BBB CoreCap tubeless valve site:wiggle.com OR site:chainreactioncycles.com
BBB CoreCap tubeless valve price EUR buy
Schwalbe Clik valve price EUR buy
LME aluminum price USD per ton today

10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve | H&S Bike-Discount GmbH
10.evidenceText: No explicit price information found in the provided content excerpts from either source.
10.extractionRationale: Neither source provided contains a specific retail price in EUR for the Clik Valve product. The bike-discount.de source describes the product and retrofit kits but does not include pricing. The schwalbe.com source only provides a product description.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve product listings on BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Three distinct Clik Valve product pages identified: (1) p1859950.html - 80mm 2er Set, (2) p1859949.html - 60mm 2er Set, (3) p1859948.html - 40mm 2er Set. Source 2 is a category page (excluded). Source 3 is a tube with Clik Valve (accessory, excluded).
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product URLs for Clik Valve (the actual valve product, not accessories or tubes). Three distinct product page URLs were identified at bike24.de with different valve sizes (40mm, 60mm, 80mm). Excluded the category page and the tube accessory listing per instructions.

30.evidenceText: Product listings contain only description and feature text, no stock status indicators present in either source
30.extractionRationale: Neither source contains stock status information such as 'out of stock', 'currently unavailable', 'nicht verfügbar', 'ausverkauft', or similar phrases. The provided content consists only of product descriptions and navigation elements, making stock status determination impossible.

56.evidenceText: Three distinct Schwalbe inner tubes with Clik Valve found: (1) No. 19-EL (Extra Light) | 27.5"/28"/29" - 40/62-584/635, (2) Nr. 13 | 26" - 40/62-559, (3) Nr. 12 | 26" - 30/47-559/597. Other products listed are valves, tubeless valves, and conversion kits which are excluded.
56.extractionRationale: Counted only distinct inner tube models (Schlauch) with Clik Valve interface from the provided evidence. Excluded valves (Clik Valve tubeless valves at 60mm and 80mm) and conversion kits (Umrüstkit) as they are not inner tubes. Three unique tube models were identified across sources 1-2.

61.sourceTitle: LME Aluminium Alloy | London Metal Exchange
61.extractionRationale: Extracted 3175.00 from the LME official website showing the highest listed official aluminum alloy price. LME aluminum prices are standardly quoted in USD/ton. Source 2 was not used as it provides a forecast rather than current spot price.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Historical Prices
62.extractionRationale: Latest date (Oct 29, 2025) shows value of 1,793.99. Assuming this is in cents/lb (typical for US aluminum premium quotes), converted to USD/lb by dividing by 100 = $17.94/lb. Confidence is low due to unit ambiguity in source.
